question: Which NFL team is ranked 31st in the Week 6 Power Rankings graphic? A. Browns B. 49ers C. Giants D. Cardinals

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A football player with blonde dreadlocks wearing a blue jersey sits on a grey medical cart labeled 'EAGLE 3'. The player holds his right leg with both hands while a man in a dark grey polo shirt drives. A text overlay displays 'WEEK 6 POWER RANKINGS' in the top right corner. The text lists the Giants at rank 30 with a 0-5 record. Other players in blue jerseys are attended to by staff on the green grass field.
